properties.name: openai.model
properties.description: OpenAI model used for code analysis and feedback.

properties.name: openai.api-key
properties.description: OpenAI API key used by the backend AI client.

properties.name: jwt.secret
properties.description: Secret key used to sign JWT access tokens.

properties.name: jwt.expiration-ms
properties.description: JWT access token expiration time in milliseconds.

properties.name: jwt.refresh-expiration-ms
properties.description: Refresh token expiration time in milliseconds.

properties.name: app.frontend-url
properties.description: Frontend base URL used for OAuth redirects.

properties.name: judge0.base-url
properties.description: Base URL for the Judge0 code execution API.

properties.name: judge0.api-key
properties.description: API key for the Judge0 provider.

properties.name: judge0.host
properties.description: Host header value for the Judge0 provider.

properties.name: spring.h2.console.enabled
properties.description: Enables the H2 web console for local development.
